decisions.rationale: Decompose layout_notes define bTIua as the fit_height row track and bTIuZ as the inline progress fill with percentage width — semantic roles, not sibling DOM order. AC-2 scopes track/fill styling on those named ui_refs; all three markers (bTIuS, bTIua, bTIuZ) pass ui_evidence with equivalent visual outcome. Nesting fill inside track matches standard progress-bar CSS and does not block DASH/PATHS depends_on gates, which need a mounted composable with clamped value prop, not Bubble parent_element_id parity.

AC-2 explicitly binds muted track background, 8px min-height, and row layout to bTIua; the transparent bTIuS root preserves className composition on the reusable wrapper while track presentation lives on the correct named ui_ref. Review ui_evidence already passes bTIuS with note that height/bgcolor are delegated to bTIua — intentional and visually equivalent.

Decompose AC-2 explicitly requires border-radius 4 on track and fill, overriding raw Bubble border_roundness 9999 (pill). Implementation is AC-compliant; criteria_audit and coverage both pass AC-2. Pixel-identical pill shape is out of scope unless AC is revised.

summary: 0 fix_now, 0 defer, 3 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. C-1 accepted: fill-inside-track nesting matches layout_notes semantics and passes all ui_refs. C-2 accepted: track styling correctly on bTIua per AC-2. C-3 accepted: 4px radius is AC-bound, deliberate deviation from Bubble pill IR.
